scripts.dev: bash -lc 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; source ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; source ../../.env; set +a; fi; next dev --webpack'
scripts.dev:turbo: bash -lc 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; source ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; source ../../.env; set +a; fi; next dev'
scripts.build: bash -lc 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; source ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; source ../../.env; set +a; fi; next build --webpack'
scripts.build:turbo: bash -lc 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; source ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; source ../../.env; set +a; fi; next build'
scripts.start: bash -lc 'if [ -f ../../docker/.env ]; then set -a; source ../../docker/.env; set +a; elif [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; source ../../.env; set +a; fi; next start'
